# @univerjs-pro/thread-comment-datasource

[![npm version](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/@univerjs-pro/thread-comment-datasource?style=flat-square)](https://npmjs.com/package/@univerjs-pro/thread-comment-datasource)
[![downloads](https://img.shields.io/npm/dm/@univerjs-pro/thread-comment-datasource?style=flat-square)](https://npmjs.com/package/@univerjs-pro/thread-comment-datasource)

`@univerjs-pro/thread-comment-datasource` provides remote data source integration for Univer thread comments.

## Package Overview

| Package | UMD global | CSS | Locales | Facade entry |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | :---: |
| `@univerjs-pro/thread-comment-datasource` | `UniverProThreadCommentDatasource` | No | No | No |

## Installation

```sh
pnpm add @univerjs-pro/thread-comment-datasource
# or
npm install @univerjs-pro/thread-comment-datasource
```

Keep all `@univerjs/*` and `@univerjs-pro/*` packages on the same version.

## Usage

```ts
import { UniverThreadCommentDataSourcePlugin } from '@univerjs-pro/thread-comment-datasource';

univer.registerPlugin(UniverThreadCommentDataSourcePlugin);
```

## Integration Notes

Use this package with collaboration client packages to persist and load thread comment data.
